[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111010110 7
1 0111111101 8
2 1001111111 8
3 1111111111 a
4 0111001101 6
5 0111111010 7
6 1010111111 8
7 1101000111 6
